metadata.description: A pack of self-contained Claude Code skills: code_assist (developer-workflow powerhouse), sb (second-brain vault capture), and unabridged (complete-output discipline). Each is installable standalone or as a plugin from this marketplace.

plugins.name: code_assist
plugins.description: Developer-workflow powerhouse — atomic commits, code review, journals, plan/debug/verify/ADR, structure, release, onboard, secure (secret-scan/git-hooks), incident, integrations. Bidirectional memory bridge. Zero-dep CLI + self-tests + agents + hooks.

plugins.name: sb
plugins.description: Second-brain — captures conversations into a project-scoped Obsidian vault; lessons, tasks, kanban, connections. Self-healing vault-repair + linkage maintenance and optional auto lesson-mining. Ingests code_assist journals/ADRs/reviews.

plugins.name: unabridged
plugins.description: Complete-output discipline — no truncation, no placeholders, no "for brevity". code_assist's full-output families defer to it when installed.
